fields.name: is_sovereign_flag
fields.why_required: Critical for risk weighting and limits

fields.name: sccl_group_id
fields.why_required: Primary key referenced by exposure summaries

fields.name: id_type
fields.description: Identifier type (PK): CUSIP, ISIN, SEDOL, TICKER, RIC

fields.name: collateral_eligibility_id
fields.why_required: Primary key for collateral eligibility rules

fields.name: collateral_category
fields.description: CASH, SECURITIES, REAL_ESTATE, RECEIVABLES, EQUIPMENT, OTHER

fields.name: crm_type_code
fields.why_required: Applies eligibility rules to a CRM type

fields.name: crm_category
fields.why_required: Drives recognition logic and regulatory treatment

fields.name: risk_mitigant_subtype_code
fields.description: Primary key for conformed mitigant taxonomy.

fields.name: parent_group_code
fields.description: Enables M-1 vs M-2 roll-ups required by dashboards.

fields.name: limit_rule_id
fields.description: PK — surrogate identifier for the approved limit rule
fields.why_required: Unique key for FK references from limit_utilization_event and limit_threshold

fields.name: counterparty_id
fields.why_required: Links limit to a specific counterparty for counterparty-level concentration limits

fields.name: inner_threshold_pct
fields.description: Warning threshold as percentage of limit amount
fields.why_required: Triggers WARNING status when utilization exceeds this percentage

fields.name: limit_amount_usd
fields.why_required: The limit value — set by credit policy; used as denominator for utilization %

fields.name: limit_scope
fields.description: Scope of the limit: COUNTERPARTY or LOB
fields.why_required: Determines whether limit is anchored to a counterparty or a LoB segment

fields.name: limit_type
fields.description: Limit classification: Single Counterparty / Sector Concentration / LoB Concentration
fields.why_required: Categorizes the limit for reporting and governance

fields.name: lob_segment_id
fields.why_required: Links limit to a LoB node for LoB-level concentration limits

fields.name: outer_threshold_pct
fields.description: Breach threshold as percentage of limit amount
fields.why_required: Triggers BREACH status when utilization exceeds this percentage

fields.name: risk_tier
fields.description: Risk tier: Tier 1 (25% Limit) / Tier 1 (15% Limit) / Limit Amount (Absolute)
fields.why_required: Drives risk tier distribution chart (Page 3) and tier-based analysis

fields.name: limit_threshold_id
fields.why_required: Unique identifier for each threshold band definition

fields.name: limit_rule_id
fields.description: FK to limit_rule — links threshold bands to a specific limit
fields.why_required: Associates threshold boundaries with approved limits

fields.name: direction
fields.description: CEILING or FLOOR — indicates if limit is a cap or a minimum
fields.why_required: Determines whether inner/outer thresholds are above or below limit

fields.name: escalation_action
fields.description: Required action when threshold is breached (e.g., Notify Risk Manager, Escalate to CRO)
fields.why_required: Drives governance workflow for limit events

fields.name: threshold_lower_abs
fields.description: Lower bound in absolute dollar terms (optional)

fields.name: threshold_lower_pct
fields.description: Lower bound of the utilization band (% of limit)
fields.why_required: Defines where this status band begins

fields.name: threshold_type
fields.description: Type of threshold band: NO_BREACH, WARNING, BREACH
fields.why_required: Classifies the severity band for limit monitoring

fields.name: threshold_upper_abs
fields.description: Upper bound in absolute dollar terms (optional)

fields.name: threshold_upper_pct
fields.description: Upper bound of the utilization band (% of limit)
fields.why_required: Defines where this status band ends

fields.name: reporting_entity_id
fields.why_required: Primary key used by positions and regulatory views

fields.name: legal_entity_id
fields.why_required: Links reporting entity to legal entity master

fields.name: org_unit_id
fields.why_required: Primary key referenced by positions and exposures

fields.name: lob_segment_id
fields.description: Enables transition from org_unit-based reporting to LoB hierarchy.

fields.name: managed_segment_id
fields.description: PK — unique identifier for the managed segment node
fields.why_required: Unique node identifier for LoB hierarchy resolution

fields.name: change_event
fields.description: Event code describing last change (e.g., SPLIT, MERGE, RENAME)

fields.name: comments
fields.why_required: Supports taxonomy review and approval workflow

fields.name: create_update_date
fields.description: Timestamp of last create or update

fields.name: description
fields.description: Short name/label of the segment node
fields.why_required: Display label for dashboards and filters

fields.name: effective_date
fields.description: Date the segment node became active

fields.name: long_description
fields.why_required: Detailed context for reporting and governance

fields.name: parent
fields.description: FK to parent managed_segment_id in same table

fields.name: parent_leaf
fields.why_required: Distinguishes rollup nodes from terminal booking nodes

fields.name: requestor
fields.description: Name or ID of person who requested the node or change

fields.name: status
fields.why_required: Controls which nodes are included in live reporting

fields.name: tree_level
fields.description: Numeric level in hierarchy (1=Top/Org, 2=L1 LoB, 3=L2 LoB, etc.)

fields.name: product_node_id
fields.description: PK — unique identifier for the product taxonomy node
fields.why_required: Unique node identifier for product hierarchy resolution

fields.name: change_event
fields.description: Event code describing last change (e.g., SPLIT, MERGE, RENAME)

fields.name: comments
fields.why_required: Supports taxonomy review and approval workflow

fields.name: create_update_date
fields.description: Timestamp of last create or update

fields.name: description
fields.description: Short name/label of the product node
fields.why_required: Display label for dashboards and filters

fields.name: effective_date
fields.description: Date the product node became active

fields.name: fr2590_category_code
fields.description: Maps product node to FR 2590 reporting category

fields.name: long_description
fields.description: Extended description of the product node
fields.why_required: Detailed context for reporting and regulatory mapping

fields.name: parent
fields.description: FK to parent product_node_id in same table

fields.name: parent_leaf
fields.why_required: Distinguishes rollup nodes from terminal booking nodes

fields.name: requestor
fields.description: Name or ID of person who requested the node or change

fields.name: status
fields.why_required: Controls which nodes are included in live reporting

fields.name: tree_level
fields.description: Numeric level in hierarchy (1=Top, 2=Product Family, 3=Product Type, etc.)
fields.why_required: Drives aggregation level for product grouping

fields.name: collateral_portfolio_id
fields.why_required: Primary key for collateral portfolio groupings

fields.name: portfolio_id
fields.why_required: Aligns collateral grouping to portfolio views

fields.name: portfolio_id
fields.why_required: Unique key for FK references from facility_master

fields.name: portfolio_code
fields.why_required: Compact display label for filters and pills

fields.name: portfolio_name
fields.description: Full descriptive name of the portfolio
fields.why_required: Display name for dashboard cards and tooltips

fields.name: lob_segment_id
fields.description: FK to enterprise_business_taxonomy — LoB alignment for this portfolio
fields.why_required: Links portfolio to LoB hierarchy for cross-dimensional analysis

fields.name: parent_portfolio_id
fields.description: FK to parent portfolio (nullable — for hierarchical portfolio structures)
fields.why_required: Supports portfolio hierarchy if sub-portfolios exist

fields.name: portfolio_type
fields.description: Classification of portfolio (e.g., Risk Segment, Product Segment, Watch List, Regulatory)
fields.why_required: Enables portfolio grouping and filter behavior

fields.name: rating_grade_id
fields.why_required: Supports integrations that require integer keys while keeping rating_grade_code as primary reporting key

fields.name: pd_12m
fields.why_required: Core risk model input and reporting

fields.name: rating_grade_code
fields.why_required: Primary key used across rating observations and aggregations

fields.name: rating_mapping_id
fields.why_required: Primary key for mapping rule rows

fields.name: display_color_hex
fields.description: Hex color code for dashboard rendering (red-to-green scale based on rating_notch)
fields.why_required: Consistent color coding of risk ratings across all pages per global design requirements

fields.name: pd_implied
fields.description: Probability of Default implied by this rating grade (annualized)
fields.why_required: Maps each rating grade to a PD for risk parameter enrichment; enables PD-based analytics without separate model lookup

fields.name: rating_grade_id
fields.description: PK — unique identifier for each rating grade entry
fields.why_required: Unique key for FK references from counterparty_rating_observation

fields.name: rating_notch
fields.description: Standardized numeric notch across all scales (1 = best, N = worst). Internal and external ratings are mapped to the same notch scale to enable direct comparison
fields.why_required: Core crosswalk field — JOIN on rating_notch across scale_types to compare internal vs external ratings; drives the Risk Rating Toggle, migration analysis, and upgrade/downgrade counts

fields.name: rating_value
fields.description: Display label for the rating grade (e.g., "AA", "BBB", "3", "CCC")
fields.why_required: Human-readable rating value for dashboard display and tooltips

fields.name: scale_type
fields.description: Rating scale source: INTERNAL, EXTERNAL_SP, EXTERNAL_MOODYS, EXTERNAL_FITCH, COMPOSITE
fields.why_required: Identifies which rating agency or internal model produced the grade; enables filtering and crosswalk joins

fields.name: rating_source_id
fields.why_required: Primary key referenced by rating observations and mappings

fields.name: priority_rank
fields.description: Precedence order when multiple ratings exist

fields.name: rating_source_name
fields.description: Rating source name (Internal, S&P, Moody's, Fitch, VendorX)

fields.name: credit_event_type_code
fields.why_required: Primary key for credit event taxonomy

fields.name: credit_event_type_id
fields.description: Surrogate credit event type identifier (alias for credit_event_type_code)
fields.why_required: Supports integrations that require numeric keys

fields.name: credit_status_code
fields.why_required: Primary key used on facility/exposure snapshots

fields.name: amendment_status_code
fields.description: Primary key for amendment status standardization.

fields.name: amendment_type_code
fields.description: Primary key for amendment type standardization.

fields.name: default_definition_id
fields.why_required: Primary key for default rule sets

fields.name: default_definition_code
fields.description: Default definition code (e.g., BASEL, IFRS9, US_GAAP_CECL)

fields.name: days_past_due_threshold
fields.description: Days past due threshold for default

fields.name: materiality_threshold_amt
fields.description: Materiality threshold for past-due default tests

fields.name: exposure_type_code
fields.why_required: Primary key used for consistent exposure categorization

fields.name: product_id
fields.why_required: Connects exposure types to product hierarchy

fields.name: scenario_horizon_months
fields.why_required: Required for stress horizon alignment and aggregation

fields.name: context_domain
fields.description: Prevents misuse of context codes across domains.

fields.name: index_code
fields.description: Short code: SOFR, EFFR, TERM_SOFR_1M, PRIME, EURIBOR_3M

fields.name: index_family
fields.description: Family: SOFR, EFFR, PRIME, LIBOR_LEGACY, EURIBOR, SONIA

fields.name: publication_source
fields.description: FEDERAL_RESERVE, ICE, REFINITIV, ECB, BOE, BOJ

fields.name: account_code
fields.description: GL account code from chart of accounts

fields.name: account_type
fields.description: ASSET, LIABILITY, EQUITY, REVENUE, EXPENSE, CONTRA

fields.name: parent_account_id
fields.description: FK to parent GL account (NULL for top-level)

fields.name: regulatory_report_code
fields.description: Mapping to regulatory report line items

fields.name: date_id
fields.why_required: Stable integer key for joins and partitioning

fields.name: date_time_id
fields.why_required: Primary key for high-granularity timestamps where needed

fields.name: date_id
fields.why_required: Joins to date_dim for date attributes

fields.name: timestamp_utc
fields.why_required: Canonical event time for cross-system alignment

fields.name: timezone_code
fields.why_required: Supports local time rendering and DST logic

fields.name: maturity_bucket_id
fields.why_required: Primary key for maturity/tenor bucketing used in liquidity, haircuts, and term structure reporting

fields.name: bucket_end_days
fields.description: Inclusive end in days (NULL for open-ended)

fields.name: reporting_calendar_id
fields.why_required: Primary key for multiple reporting calendars (regulatory vs management)

fields.name: as_of_date
fields.why_required: Joins to date_dim; used by run_control and snapshots

fields.name: cutoff_ts
fields.description: Default cutoff timestamp for the as-of date

fields.name: is_period_end_flag
fields.description: Whether the date is a reporting period end

fields.name: region_code
fields.description: Enables Region filter and rollups (e.g., North America, Europe) and resolves country_dim.region_code FK.

fields.name: region_name
fields.description: Human-readable label for dashboards and filters.

fields.name: display_order
fields.description: Stable ordering in dropdowns and charts.

fields.name: region_group_code
fields.description: Supports alternate rollups and simplified filter UX.

fields.name: minor_unit_decimals
fields.why_required: For rounding (2 for USD, 0 for JPY)

fields.name: regulatory_capital_basis_id
fields.why_required: Primary key for capital basis taxonomy

fields.name: calculation_rule_id
fields.why_required: Enables consistent derived logic without code changes

fields.name: mdrm_id
fields.why_required: Primary key used by regulatory snapshots (e.g., FR 2590)

fields.name: metric_name
fields.description: Metric name associated to the cell

fields.name: cell_id
fields.why_required: Primary key for report layout metadata

fields.name: model_id
fields.why_required: Primary key referenced by mappings and model outputs

fields.name: model_type
fields.why_required: Routes outputs to the right consumers

fields.name: rule_expression
fields.description: Expression or DSL for the rule

fields.name: report_code
fields.description: Report or dataset identifier (e.g., FR2590, BCBS239)

fields.name: run_version_id
fields.why_required: Ties recon outcomes to the exact data snapshot

fields.name: report_code
fields.why_required: Primary key used across reporting metadata and mappings

fields.name: as_of_date
fields.description: Business as-of date for the run
fields.why_required: Aligns all fact snapshots to a consistent reporting date

fields.name: cutoff_ts
fields.why_required: Defines data completeness boundary; required for auditability

fields.name: run_version_id
fields.why_required: Primary key used by L2/L3 facts for point-in-time reproducibility

fields.name: status
fields.why_required: Run lifecycle control and downstream gating

fields.name: source_system_id
fields.why_required: Primary key; anchors lineage across all layers

fields.name: check_id
fields.why_required: Primary key for data quality/controls registry

fields.name: validation_check_id
fields.description: Surrogate validation check identifier (alias for check_id)
fields.why_required: Matches naming expectations in downstream control tooling

fields.name: metric_definition_id
fields.description: Primary key for controlled metric semantics.

fields.name: calculation_rule_id
fields.description: Links definition to executable logic when applicable.

fields.name: version
fields.description: Supports controlled evolution of metric definitions.

fields.name: internal_risk_rating_bucket_code
fields.why_required: Primary key for rating bucket lookup

fields.name: bucket_name
fields.description: Human-readable name of the rating bucket
fields.why_required: Display label for reports and dashboards

fields.name: rating_score_min
fields.description: Lower bound of the internal rating score range
fields.why_required: Defines bucket boundaries for rating classification

fields.name: rating_score_max
fields.description: Upper bound of the internal rating score range
fields.why_required: Defines bucket boundaries for rating classification

fields.name: display_order
fields.description: Sort order for display in reports
fields.why_required: Consistent ordering in UI and reports

fields.name: pricing_tier_code
fields.why_required: Primary key for pricing tier lookup

fields.name: tier_name
fields.why_required: Display label for revenue and pricing reports

fields.name: tier_ordinal
fields.why_required: Defines tier ordering for comparison analytics

fields.name: display_order
fields.description: Sort order for display in reports
fields.why_required: Consistent ordering in UI and reports

fields.name: position_id
fields.why_required: Core PK for all position-level facts
fields.simplification_note: Simplified from 41→28 fields. Removed refs to non-existent L1 tables. All fields are source-system attributes.

fields.name: lgd_estimate
fields.why_required: MUST BE SOURCE SYSTEM INPUT — Loss Given Default from credit risk model (e.g., downturn LGD model). Requires collateral recovery assumptions, seniority, jurisdiction-specific recovery data not available in this data model.

fields.name: netting_set_id
fields.why_required: Links position to netting set for close-out netting

fields.name: pd_estimate
fields.why_required: MUST BE SOURCE SYSTEM INPUT — PIT Probability of Default from credit risk model (e.g., Moody's RiskCalc, internal IRB model). Cannot be re-derived without underlying obligor financials, market data, and model calibration.

fields.name: product_code
fields.why_required: Drives subtype join and product classification

fields.name: position_id
fields.simplification_note: CONSOLIDATED from 6 subtype tables. All fields are source-system attributes.

fields.name: ccf
fields.why_required: MUST BE SOURCE SYSTEM INPUT — Credit Conversion Factor from regulatory/internal model. Basel-prescribed or model-based CCF for off-balance sheet items. Mapped by exposure type and regulatory approach (SA vs IRB).

fields.name: haircut_applied_pct
fields.why_required: MUST BE SOURCE SYSTEM INPUT — Supervisory or model-based haircut from collateral management system. Depends on asset type, holding period, and volatility assumptions.

fields.name: pfe
fields.why_required: MUST BE SOURCE SYSTEM INPUT — SA-CCR Potential Future Exposure from risk engine. Requires supervisory factors, hedging set decomposition, delta adjustments not available in this data model.

fields.name: replacement_cost
fields.why_required: MUST BE SOURCE SYSTEM INPUT — SA-CCR replacement cost from risk engine. Requires trade-level Greeks, market data curves, and close-out netting logic not available in this data model.

fields.name: counterparty_id
fields.description: FK to counterparty — party receiving exposure

fields.name: risk_shifted_from_counterparty_id
fields.description: FK to original counterparty (NULL if not shifted)

fields.name: facility_exposure_id
fields.simplification_note: Facility-level gross/net exposure snapshot. Atomic: 1 facility × 1 date. CRM-adjusted net_exposure_usd computed here. | Atomic gross exposure. Net exposure and coverage ratios computed in L3 by joining collateral_snapshot.

fields.name: netting_set_id
fields.why_required: Links to L1 netting set master

fields.name: collateral_held_usd
fields.why_required: MUST BE SOURCE SYSTEM INPUT — Collateral held per netting set from margin/collateral management system. Reflects CSA terms, margin calls, and collateral eligibility.

fields.name: gross_mtm_usd
fields.why_required: MUST BE SOURCE SYSTEM INPUT — Gross MTM from front-office/risk engine. Sum of position-level MTMs within netting set before netting benefit.

fields.name: netting_set_exposure_id
fields.simplification_note: Netting-set-level exposure for derivatives/SFT. Atomic: 1 netting_set × 1 date. Separate from facility exposure. | RE-ADDED. Atomic netting set exposure record from the CCR/SA-CCR engine. Now anchored to L1.netting_set. Each row = 1 netting set × 1 date. Records gross/net MTM, PFE, EAD, and collateral held per netting set.

fields.name: pfe_usd
fields.why_required: MUST BE SOURCE SYSTEM INPUT — PFE from SA-CCR/IMM engine. Requires add-on calculations with supervisory factors, hedging set decomposition per BCBS standards.

fields.name: attribution_pct
fields.description: % of facility exposure to this LoB (must sum to 100%)

fields.name: collateral_snapshot_id
fields.simplification_note: Consolidated CRM snapshot combining funded collateral AND unfunded protection. L2 unified view of L1 collateral_asset_master + crm_protection_master via risk_mitigant_master. | CONSOLIDATED from 4 CRM tables. Each row = 1 mitigant allocation to 1 facility. eligible_value is same-row derivation.

fields.name: mitigant_group_code
fields.description: Parent group: M1 (Eligible Collateral) or M2 (Other Eligible Risk Mitigants)

fields.name: mitigant_subtype
fields.description: Risk mitigation sub-type (Cash, Sovereign Debt, Guarantees, etc.)
fields.why_required: Risk Mitigation by Type chart (Page 2) - y-axis

fields.name: original_valuation_usd
fields.why_required: Facility drawer — original vs current comparison

fields.name: delinquency_snapshot_id
fields.simplification_note: Source-system delinquency record. total_overdue_amt is same-row sum stamped by servicing system.

fields.name: facility_pricing_id
fields.simplification_note: Point-in-time pricing snapshot per facility (rate, spread, cap). Captures pricing AS OF a date. L1 facility_master has contractual pricing; this L2 captures observed/effective pricing. | Source-system pricing record. all_in_rate and below_threshold_flag are same-grain source-system outputs.

fields.name: rate_cap_pct
fields.description: Interest rate cap percentage (for variable rates)

fields.name: profitability_snapshot_id
fields.simplification_note: Source-system profitability record. NII, NIM, ROA, ROE are same-grain source-system outputs from FTP engine.

fields.name: contribution_id
fields.simplification_note: Line-item breakdown of what contributes to a limit's utilization. Child of limit_utilization_event — decomposes the total into per-facility/counterparty amounts. | L2 review new table

fields.name: reporting_ts
fields.description: Timestamp of utilization report from source

fields.name: utilization_event_id
fields.simplification_note: Total utilized amount against a limit_rule at a point in time. For line-item decomposition, see limit_contribution_snapshot. | Atomic utilization observation. Raw utilized amount only. Headroom/pct/status computed in L3.

fields.name: utilized_amount_usd
fields.description: Utilized amount reported by source system (USD)

fields.name: amendment_event_id
fields.simplification_note: Atomic line-item: 1 changed field per amendment.

fields.name: change_currency_code
fields.description: Currency code if change is currency-valued

fields.name: amendment_event_id
fields.simplification_note: Atomic amendment lifecycle record from credit workflow system.

fields.name: amendment_status
fields.description: Status (Prospect Identified / In Underwriting / Under Credit Review / Pending Approval / Complete / Rejected)

fields.name: amendment_subtype
fields.description: Amendment subtype detail (e.g., Increase, Extension, SOFR Transition)

fields.name: amendment_type
fields.description: Amendment type (Commitment Changes / Pricing / Tenor-Maturity / Amortization / Currency)

fields.name: credit_event_id
fields.simplification_note: Atomic event record. Aggregated counts/amounts (facility count, exposure impact) computed in L3 from junction table.

fields.name: breach_id
fields.simplification_note: Individual breach details within a stress test execution. Child of stress_test_result. | L2 review new table

fields.name: lob_segment_id
fields.description: FK to enterprise_business_taxonomy — LoB node for pipeline deal (replaces inline lob_l1/l2)

fields.name: pipeline_deal_id
fields.simplification_note: Atomic pipeline deal snapshot from CRM/origination system.

fields.name: pipeline_stage
fields.description: Pipeline stage (Origination / Credit Review / Approval / Closing / Funded)

fields.name: observation_id
fields.simplification_note: Simplified. Each row = 1 rating observation from 1 agency for 1 counterparty.

fields.name: rating_grade_id
fields.description: FK to rating_scale_dim — maps this observation to the canonical rating grade with standardized rating_notch for cross-scale comparison
fields.why_required: Core linkage for standardized rating analytics: crosswalk between internal and external scales, migration tracking via rating_notch delta, color coding, IG/non-IG segmentation
fields.simplification_note: NEW: Enables standardized rating comparison via rating_notch join.

fields.name: pd_implied
fields.why_required: MUST BE SOURCE SYSTEM INPUT — PD implied by external rating from rating agency mapping tables (e.g., S&P transition matrices). Requires agency-specific calibration.

fields.name: prior_rating_value
fields.why_required: MUST BE SOURCE SYSTEM INPUT — Previous rating value stamped by rating observation system at time of rating action. Source system lookback, not a cross-row derivation.

fields.name: rating_type
fields.description: INTERNAL or EXTERNAL — high-level classification of rating source
fields.why_required: Drives Risk Rating Toggle; can also be derived from rating_scale_dim.scale_type but kept for direct filtering
fields.simplification_note: UPDATED: Retained for convenience filtering alongside rating_grade_id FK.

fields.name: rating_value
fields.description: Rating value label (e.g., "AA", "3") — RETAINED for source-system traceability but rating_grade_id FK is the governed reference
fields.why_required: Source-system rating value as ingested; use rating_grade_id for standardized analytics
fields.simplification_note: UPDATED: Supplementary to rating_grade_id FK. Use FK for joins/analytics.

fields.name: observation_id
fields.simplification_note: Actual metric measurements per entity per date. Stores the observed VALUE. Thresholds for comparison are in metric_threshold. | Atomic metric measurement per entity per date. Generic store for scorecard and regulatory metrics.

fields.name: metric_category
fields.description: Category (Regulatory / Internal / FED Benchmark / Industry Benchmark)

fields.name: exception_id
fields.simplification_note: L2 exception lifecycle events (breaches, waivers, overrides). Different from L1 exception_rule which defines standing exception rules. This is the EVENT record when an exception occurs. | NEW table. Mirrors limit structure with severity, lifecycle, and governance attributes.

fields.name: exception_type
fields.description: Type of exception: LIMIT_BREACH, COVENANT_WAIVER, POLICY_OVERRIDE, THRESHOLD_EXCEEDANCE, DOCUMENTATION_GAP
fields.why_required: Classifies the nature of the exception for reporting

fields.name: facility_id
fields.description: FK to facility_master — the facility involved in the exception

fields.name: counterparty_id
fields.description: FK to counterparty — the counterparty involved

fields.name: actual_remediation_date
fields.description: Date exception was actually remediated (null if open)

fields.name: approver
fields.description: Name or ID of the approver (for approved exceptions)

fields.name: breach_amount_usd
fields.description: Dollar amount of the breach (value minus threshold)
fields.why_required: Quantifies exposure impact of the exception

fields.name: exception_description
fields.description: Free-text description of the exception event

fields.name: exception_owner
fields.description: Name or ID of the person responsible for resolving

fields.name: exception_status
fields.description: Status: OPEN, UNDER_REVIEW, APPROVED, REMEDIATED, EXPIRED

fields.name: exception_value
fields.description: The observed value that triggered the exception
fields.why_required: Captures the metric/limit value at time of exception

fields.name: limit_rule_id
fields.description: FK to limit_rule if exception relates to a limit breach
fields.why_required: Links exception to the breached limit

fields.name: lob_segment_id
fields.description: FK to enterprise_business_taxonomy — LoB segment where exception occurred

fields.name: metric_threshold_id
fields.description: FK to metric_threshold if exception relates to a metric threshold breach
fields.why_required: Links exception to the breached metric threshold

fields.name: target_remediation_date
fields.description: Expected date for remediation or resolution

fields.name: threshold_value
fields.description: The threshold or limit value that was breached

fields.name: risk_flag_id
fields.simplification_note: Consolidated flag observations (DETERIORATED, WATCH_LIST, COVENANT_BREACH, etc.). 1 row = 1 flag × 1 entity × 1 date. | CONSOLIDATED from 2 flag tables. Each row = 1 flag observation for 1 entity.

fields.name: flag_code
fields.description: Flag code (DETERIORATED, WATCH_LIST, COVENANT_BREACH, BELOW_THRESHOLD_SPREAD, CRITICIZED)

fields.name: flag_trigger_value
fields.description: Trigger value (e.g., DPD count, spread vs threshold)
